prestazioni: LS9 (6.2L Supercharged V8) engine: Replace the OEM Eaton M122 supercharger with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger kit (12 psi boost, 850+ WHP on E85), paired with a custom billet crankshaft from Callies Performance Products (forged 4340 steel, 4.000" stroke) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression, coated skirts).

Exhaust: Full titanium 3.5" diameter exhaust system by Burns Stainless (equal-length headers, merge collectors, and 304 stainless steel mufflers with titanium tips), integrated with a custom X-pipe from Vibrant Performance (1799-series, 3.5" diameter).

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (CTS-V Coupe-specific valving, 2-way adjustable damping, 20mm front/15mm rear ride height adjustment) with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 1200N/mm rear springs. Brembo GT-R 6-piston front (390mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (360mm rotors) brake kit with Pagid RS29 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.

Drivetrain: Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a Spec Stage 5+ twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic friction material, 1200 lb-ft torque capacity) and a billet aluminum flywheel from Fidanza. Differential upgraded to a Wavetrac LSD with 3.73:1 gearing and a custom driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop (3.5" aluminum, 1350-series U-joints).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (CTS-V Coupe-specific, carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed ABS rear wing (1,200mm span, 300mm chord, 15° angle of attack) from APR Performance. Front splitter from Varis (carbon fiber, 3-stage adjustable).
Wheels: Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" ET25 front and 20x12" ET45 rear wheels (matte bronze finish, 5x120 bolt pattern) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30/20 front, 335/25/20 rear).

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Katzkin (custom diamond-stitched pattern, red contrast stitching) with Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Schroth 6-point harnesses). Custom roll cage by Autopower (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, integrated with a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel and AiM MXS Strada dash display).
